category_title: Chamorro 5th-grade student with ADHD and literacy challenges
scenario_title: Small group oral retelling and word recall
minimal_context: Juan is participating in a small group oral retelling session of the tale 'The Old Lady in the Vinegar Bottle'.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our small group oral retelling of 'The Old Lady in the Vinegar Bottle'.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is your turn. Please start from the beginning.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Okay. It feels like magic, for example it just like all comes out. The story that I told and heard. A magic tape recorder. (Starts from the beginning) Once there was an old lady...

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stumbles when he can't recall some words) I can't remember the next part. It’s fun, because everyone’s in a group. We’re all forgetting, but we’re all helping each other. Someone tell me the word.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our small group oral retelling of 'The Old Lady in the Vinegar Bottle'.

STUDENT: Okay whose turn?

TUTOR: It is your turn. Please start from the beginning.

STUDENT: Okay. It feels like magic, for example it just like all comes out. The story that I told and heard. A magic tape recorder. (Starts from the beginning) Once there was an old lady...

TUTOR: Keep going.

STUDENT: (Stumbles when he can't recall some words) I can't remember the next part. It’s fun, because everyone’s in a group. We’re all forgetting, but we’re all helping each other. Someone tell me the word.

task.content: Small group oral retelling of a favorite tale titled 'The Old Lady in the Vinegar Bottle'

context.environment: One-hour retelling sessions two times per week for four months
context.social_setting: Small group setting with three classmates, also Chamorro Pacific Islanders

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When it is his turn to start the retelling from the beginning
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Starts from the beginning but stumbles when he can't recall some words
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Views the group process as a shared memory exercise where everyone helps each other
related_quotes: It’s fun, because everyone’s in a group. We’re all forgetting, but we’re all helping each other.

behavior_patterns.condition: When participating in collaborative oral retelling sessions
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Stays on task, does not disrupt the group, maintains a productive role even without supervision, and works cooperatively
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Feels like the story is recorded in his head like a magic tape recorder
related_quotes: It feels like magic, for example it just like all comes out.
Like for example, those are my imaginary friends. Like all recorded in my head.
The story that I told and heard. A magic tape recorder.
